rule_text: A TOTAL of 3 SEWAGE PUMPING STATIONS (SPS) and 3 LIFT STATIONS SHALL be CONSTRUCTED to carry RAW SEWAGE to NARAVA STP located within the Project area. SPS-2 PUMPS configuration: 3 WORKING + 2 STANDBY pumps with capacities 405 m³/hr and 283 m³/hr.
verification_method: PASS if BoQ enumerates 3 SPS + 3 LS with stated pump configuration. FAIL on missing redundancy or wrong capacity.

rule_text: SEWER NETWORK DESIGN SHALL MINIMISE PUMPING REQUIREMENT — Lift Stations may be PROVIDED ONLY for LOCALISED SMALL AREAS where unavoidable. The contractor SHALL DESIGN the COMPLETE sewerage network for Gajuwaka area in the project boundary.
source_clause: Volume II — Sewer Network Design Principle
verification_method: PASS if design rationale demonstrates LS minimisation. FAIL if LS introduced where gravity flow is feasible.

rule_text: PRE-EXECUTION SITE WORK SHALL include: (i) DEMARCATING alignment of sewer pipelines, valve chambers, thrust blocks, pipe supports; (ii) INSTALLING WARNING BOARDS, SIGNBOARDS and TRAFFIC DIVERSION SYSTEMS for public safety; (iii) CUTTING BT/concrete surfaces using cutting machines (minimise damage, optimise restoration width); (iv) EXCAVATING trenches to required depth maintaining hydraulic levels; (v) PROVIDING SHORING and STRUTTING per site requirements to PREVENT TRENCH COLLAPSE; (vi) BAILING OUT WATER from trenches using appropriate pumping; (vii) preparing BEDDING LAYERS and laying DI K-9 pipes per alignment drawings.
verification_method: PASS if MOS (method statement) covers all 7 mandatory steps. FAIL on missing step.

rule_text: PIPE MATERIAL SPECIFICATION: SUPPLY, LOWERING and LAYING of DUCTILE IRON (DI) K-9 GRADE PIPES along with ALL SPECIALS and VALVES (air valve, scour valve, sluice valve / isolation valve) SHALL be per the alignment drawing AND the invert level of the pipeline SHALL be PER the APPROVED DRAWINGS.
verification_method: PASS if BoQ specifies DI K-9 (ISO 2531 / IS 8329). FAIL if lower-class DI or substitute pipe spec.

rule_text: SAFETY PROTOCOLS SHALL be FOLLOWED for construction workers — INCLUDING (i) PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT (PPE); (ii) CONFINED SPACE ENTRY procedures; (iii) TRAINING; (iv) TRENCH SAFETY guidelines (signage, barriers, emergency response plans) during trenching and shoring; (v) ELECTRICAL and MECHANICAL safety (proper grounding, insulation, machine guards, emergency-stop controls); (vi) EMERGENCY RESPONSE PLAN — to be DEVELOPED and REGULARLY UPDATED during construction and operation.
verification_method: PASS if HSE plan covers all 6 elements + names competent supervisors. FAIL on missing element.

rule_text: PIPELINE ROUTE MARKERS SHALL be PROVIDED along the pipeline route for QUICK and EASY IDENTIFICATION. Marker design: CONCRETE STONES.
verification_method: PASS if marker drawings + locations included in submission. FAIL on missing marker plan.
